title: rubus × gugleri
intro: Rubus × gugleri, also known as the hybrid blackberry, is a cross between the Rubus fruticosus and Rubus idaeus species, resulting in a unique shrub with edible fruits. The medicinal properties of Rubus × gugleri include its high content of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × gugleri include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Rubus × gugleri may include teas, tinctures, and jams made from the ripe fruits, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
